queries.question: Show both economist positions  that require financial analysis and statistician positions that require the same.
queries.sql:
SELECT Jobs.title 
FROM Roles JOIN Jobs ON Roles.RoleID = Jobs.ROLEID JOIN DataTypes ON Jobs.DATAID = DataTypes.DataTypeID
WHERE (Roles.RoleName = "Economist" OR Roles.RoleName = "Statistician") AND DataTypes.DataTypeName = "Financial Analysis"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?roles a :Roles .
  ?jobs a :Jobs .
  ?jobs p:hasRoles ?roles .
  ?datatypes a :DataTypes .
  ?jobs p:hasDataTypes ?datatypes .
  ?jobs p:Title ?title .
  ?roles p:RoleName ?rolename_w .
  ?roles p:RoleName ?rolename_w2 .
  ?datatypes p:DataTypeName ?datatypename_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?rolename_w) = "Economist" || STR(?rolename_w2) = "Statistician")) && STR(?datatypename_w) = "Financial Analysis"))
}

queries.question: List economist positions and statistician positions that require financial analysis.
queries.sql:
SELECT Jobs.title 
FROM Roles JOIN Jobs ON Roles.RoleID = Jobs.ROLEID JOIN DataTypes ON Jobs.DATAID = DataTypes.DataTypeID
WHERE Roles.RoleName = "Economist" OR Roles.RoleName = "Statistician" AND DataTypes.DataTypeName = "Financial Analysis"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?roles a :Roles .
  ?jobs a :Jobs .
  ?jobs p:hasRoles ?roles .
  ?datatypes a :DataTypes .
  ?jobs p:hasDataTypes ?datatypes .
  ?jobs p:Title ?title .
  ?roles p:RoleName ?rolename_w .
  ?roles p:RoleName ?rolename_w2 .
  ?datatypes p:DataTypeName ?datatypename_w .
  FILTER((STR(?rolename_w) = "Economist" || (STR(?rolename_w2) = "Statistician" && STR(?datatypename_w) = "Financial Analysis")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List economist positions and statistician positions that require financial analysis.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?roles a :Roles .
  ?jobs a :Jobs .
  ?jobs p:hasRoles ?roles .
  ?datatypes a :DataTypes .
  ?jobs p:hasDataTypes ?datatypes .
  ?jobs p:Title ?title .
  ?roles p:RoleName ?rolename_w .
  ?roles p:RoleName ?rolename_w2 .
  ?datatypes p:DataTypeName ?datatypename_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?rolename_w) = "Economist" || STR(?rolename_w2) = "Statistician")) && STR(?datatypename_w) = "Financial Analysis"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?roles a :Roles .
  ?jobs a :Jobs .
  ?jobs p:hasRoles ?roles .
  ?datatypes a :DataTypes .
  ?jobs p:hasDataTypes ?datatypes .
  ?jobs p:Title ?title .
  ?roles p:RoleName ?rolename_w .
  ?roles p:RoleName ?rolename_w2 .
  ?datatypes p:DataTypeName ?datatypename_w .
  FILTER((STR(?rolename_w) = "Economist" || (STR(?rolename_w2) = "Statistician" && STR(?datatypename_w) = "Financial Analysis")))
} }
}
